response.body:
{"conversation_id":"180ee6d9-71df-48e6-8fc3-805b6a390f88","turn_number":2,"role":"assistant","content":"Hello! I’m RFQ Copilot. How can I help with your RFQ today?

I can assist with:
- Scope clarification and questions to remove ambiguities
- Cost estimation (materials, labor, overhead, contingency)
- Bill of Materials (BoM) creation and validation
- Supplier quote requests and comparison
- Lead times, production capacity, and logistics considerations
- Risk flags and scenario analysis (e.g., batch size, tariffs, exchange rates)

If you have an RFQ document, you can share key details here. To get started, please provide:
- Project/asset description and item(s) requiring quotes
- Quantities and unit of measure
- Specifications, drawings, or standards to follow
- Required lead time and delivery location
- Incoterms and packaging requirements
- Any special tests, warranties, or quality requirements
- Budget or target cost, if available
- Any constraints or assumptions to consider

What would you like to tackle first?","source_refs":[]}
